programme.title: VanLab
programme.desc: Antoine et Marianne apprennent à manipuler des marionnettes géantes au Théâtre de la Dame de C?ur; Amély ouvre les grandes portes des écluses de Chambly; Lori'anne recrée les sons de son propre film avec l'aide d'un bruiteur de cinéma.

programme.title: Savais-tu?

programme.title: Tarzan et Jane
programme.desc: Tandis qu'ils cherchent le responsable au Maroc, Tarzan et Jane apprennent soudainement que des bulldozers Greystoke volés se dirigent tout droit vers le village de Tarzan dans la jungle.

programme.title: Angry Birds Toons

programme.title: Bernard

programme.desc: Marie sees Frank putting salt on the lasagna, so she fears that she is losing her touch in the kitchen.

programme.desc: Robert gets angry when Ray tells him his wife talks too much.

programme.desc: Ray's latest manipulative plan involves constantly turning down Debra.

programme.desc: Robert's mother-in-law, Pat, is concealing a big secret from her family.

programme.desc: Chelsea tries to help her beautiful college roommate get over a bad breakup.

programme.title: Two and a Half Men
programme.desc: Charlie discovers he has not been satisfying Chelsea; Alan attempts to cure his thinning hair without spending much money.

programme.desc: Charlie attempts to guide Jake down the path of infidelity while his girlfriend is away for the holidays.

programme.title: Two and a Half Men
programme.desc: Charlie undergoes a colonoscopy to avoid a trip to see Chelsea's bigoted parents, but he finds them in his living room when he returns home.

programme.title: Two and a Half Men
programme.desc: A bar fight lands Alan in jail; Charlie worries that Chelsea is interested in the lawyer who takes Alan's case.

programme.desc: Alan and Walden end up partying too hard as they try to cheer up Herb.

programme.title: People Magazine Presents: Crimes of the '90s
programme.desc: A vacation hotspot loses its charm when a killer bludgeons a teen at work; investigators hunt the murderer, knowing each passing day could bring another victim and plunge the town deeper into fear.

programme.desc: A man confesses to accidentally killing his best friend while cleaning his gun; during his interrogation, he stuns police by revealing that he's behind a long trail of bloodshed and is a serial killer who seems to consider himself an angel of mercy.

programme.title: Signs of a Psychopath
programme.desc: When Omaha, Neb., police officers arrest the driver of a stolen van, he shocks detectives by giving an unsolicited confession to a gruesome murder, and it is only the first of many chilling revelations.

programme.title: Signs of a Psychopath
programme.desc: A man calls 911 with his dying breath, and first responders arrive to find him brutally murdered and stabbed 59 times; when detectives question his best friend, they uncover a tangled story of deception and jealousy that ends in psychopathic rage.

programme.title: Signs of a Psychopath
programme.desc: A killer shoots a young woman dead in her boyfriend's Orlando, Fla., apartment; hours later, he turns up in a hospital bed 500 miles away with a gunshot wound and a bizarre story that unravels to reveal he's a lying, callous psychopath.

programme.title: Signs of a Psychopath
programme.desc: A gunman shoots a man dead as he runs along a country road, and first responders find a witness standing next to the body with a strange story to tell; detectives unravel the lies of a callous psychopath who takes out his frustrations in bloodshed.

programme.title: Signs of a Psychopath
programme.desc: A woman finds her elderly brother dead in his bedroom with his throat slashed; uncovering the truth poses a challenge for detectives, as the individual responsible for killing him is a manipulative psychopath who craftily deflects blame.

programme.title: Signs of a Psychopath
programme.desc: Investigators search a farm for a missing man and find a human leg bone on the property; the owner, Susan Monica, admits that her pigs ate her tenant alive, and he's not the only victim; Monica despises humans but loves her pigs.

programme.title: Signs of a Psychopath
programme.desc: A racially motivated serial killer on death row who targeted civil rights leader Vernon Jordan and pornography publisher Larry Flynt confesses to additional unsolved murders with the help of a shrewd female prosecutor.

programme.title: Signs of a Psychopath
programme.desc: Police find a 17-year-old female's dead body in a ditch with two gunshot wounds; the investigation centers on two friends of the victim claiming her death was an accident, but detectives uncover it was a thrill kill carried out by evil psychopaths.

programme.title: Signs of a Psychopath
programme.desc: A New Hampshire town reels after police arrest four teenagers for robbing and murdering a 42-year-old mother and maiming her 11-year-old daughter; detectives uncover two suspects with the characteristics of sadistic psychopaths.

programme.title: Signs of a Psychopath
programme.desc: A vehicle plows down a 75-year-old military veteran on a country road in an apparent hit-and-run; when a young man confesses to the crime, detectives quickly learn they've encountered a psychopath with an intense desire to thrill kill.

programme.title: Signs of a Psychopath
programme.desc: When a young mother goes missing, her husband joins the search; police discover her dismembered body in a stack of bins; detectives find her husband to be a typical suburban dad, but learn a murderous psychopath lurks within.

programme.title: Evil Lives Here: The Killer Speaks
programme.desc: Jamie-Lee Arrow reunites with her father, Isakin Drabbad, known as the Skara Cannibal, to confront him about the murder of his girlfriend.

programme.title: American Monster: Abuse of Power
programme.desc: Larry Nassar becomes the go-to doctor for treating injured gymnasts after he helps the USA win Olympic gold; young women flock to him for rehabilitation; it takes years before the true cost of his medal-winning techniques comes to light.

programme.desc: Jamie-Lee visits her father, the Skara Cannibal, to ask him about the murder of his girlfriend.

programme.desc: A college freshman who just made the cheerleading squad finds herself falling for a much older man.

programme.title: Dying to Be You
programme.desc: Terror strikes when a young woman learns that her pen pal since childhood plans to take over her life.

programme.title: Abducted on Prom Night
programme.desc: A recently divorced mother allows her troubled daughter to attend prom, but what was supposed to be the best night of their lives turns into a twisted cat-and-mouse game when the daughter and her friends are taken hostage by their limousine driver.

programme.title: CSI: Miami
programme.desc: When a condemned ax-murderer on death row appeals for his life, the team must investigate.

programme.title: NCIS: Los Angeles
programme.desc: CIA Officer Veronica Stephens asked the team for help when an agricultural engineer Hetty asked her to bring to the United States disappears.

programme.title: Escaping Polygamy
programme.desc: Raymond Jeffs, the son of notorious FLDS Church leader Warren Jeffs, pleads for help in getting his brother out of the group; tensions flare when the team's plan to spring the prophet's son gets exposed.

programme.title: Escaping Polygamy
programme.desc: An escapee from the FLDS polygamist cult asks Jessica and Amanda for help in getting her boyfriend out; the trip into unknown FLDS territory does not go as planned.

programme.title: Scorpion
programme.desc: After extinguishing a catastrophic tunnel fire, Team Scorpion helps Toby and Happy get to their wedding ceremony.

programme.title: Abducted by My Teacher: The Elizabeth Thomas Story
programme.desc: The story of Elizabeth Thomas, a 15-year-old high school student who was groomed and abducted by teacher Tad Cummins.

programme.desc: Refusing to marry the man who abused her as a child, an Amish teen runs away to a neighboring city and tries to adjust to life in the modern world.

programme.desc: A young woman uncovers a dark secret about her family when her stepmother dies and mysterious deaths begin to occur.

programme.title: CSI: Miami
programme.desc: Horatio finally learns the truth about what happened to his brother, and the repercussions will change his life forever.

programme.title: NCIS: Los Angeles
programme.desc: After a rise in deaths caused by black market opioid use, the NCIS team links the street drug to funding for terrorist activities.

programme.title: Escaping Polygamy
programme.desc: A man and his family seek to escape an organization that all but forces its members into a life of polygamy, but an explosive secret about the man's dark past in the group places the entire team in danger.

programme.desc: Isaac Jeffs, son of notorious FLDS prophet Warren Jeffs, asks for help to find his mother, who was ripped away from him by the religion; after finding one of the cult leader's wives, Isaac must gather enough courage to deliver shocking information.

programme.desc: Team Scorpion has little hope for rescue after their plane crash-lands on a remote, deserted island while en route to Toby and Happy's honeymoon.

programme.title: See No Evil
programme.desc: In a home in downtown Baltimore, a man finds 24-year-old father and youth worker Dion Smith executed with a shotgun. The other residents are cagey, but a suspicious visitor is singled out thanks to telling CCTV outside the victim's door.

programme.title: See No Evil
programme.desc: In Baltimore, a killer strangles two women to death less than a week apart; investigators piece together the clues from CCTV footage from the locations of the two homicides to reveal a suspect with designs on becoming a serial killer.

programme.title: Trapped in the Farmhouse
programme.desc: On the run from her abusive boyfriend, a woman takes shelter in an isolated farmhouse, unaware that something far worse is waiting for her inside.

programme.title: Boy in the Walls
programme.desc: Unable to shake the feeling that someone is always watching her, a new stepmother makes a terrifying discovery after hearing strange noises in her house.

programme.title: Crowdsource Murder
programme.desc: A friend encourages Monica to start a crowdsource fund to pay for her daughter's hospital bills. However, when an attractive and seemingly generous man donates more and more money, she begins to question his motives.

programme.title: A Party to Die For
programme.desc: When an after party goes wrong, new friends Sadie and Jessica must hide a dead body. Jessica has a dirty secret to hold over Sadie. The police piece together clues that lead to Sadie, putting people in Sadie's life in danger.

programme.title: Haïti: au-delà du jeu
programme.desc: Comment une nation peut-elle revenir après 52 ans de silence, dans un contexte marqué par les crises et les tragédies récentes ? Ce premier chapitre pose les bases : un retour qui dépasse le sport, chargé d'histoire et de mémoire.

programme.title: Coupe du monde de soccer: avant-match
Coupe du Monde de la FIFA 2026
programme.desc: FIFA Soccer. Le Qatar affronte la Suisse lors du second match du groupe B. Granit Xhaka, joueur de centre, avait mené l'équipe suisse lors des qualifications face à l'attaquant Akram Afif; le Qatar a décroché pour la première fois une place dans le tournoi.

programme.title: Coupe du monde de soccer: avant-match
Coupe du Monde de la FIFA 2026
programme.desc: FIFA Soccer. Dans le premier match du groupe C, le Brésil fait face au Maroc. Vinícius Júnior est à la tête du Brésil, le seul pays à avoir participé à tous les tournois de la Coupe du Monde; Achraf Hakimi est la pièce clé de la composition marocaine.

programme.title: Coupe du monde de soccer: avant-match
Coupe du Monde de la FIFA 2026
programme.desc: FIFA Soccer. Haïti fait face à l'Écosse dans un match historique pour le groupe C au Boston Stadium. L'Écosse retourne sur la scène mondiale pour la première fois depuis 1998 ; Haïti fait sa première apparition au tournoi depuis 1974.

programme.title: 30 images/seconde
programme.desc: Des palmarès percutants réunissant les moments forts du monde du sport.

programme.title: Coupe du monde de soccer: avant-match
Coupe du Monde de la FIFA 2026
programme.desc: FIFA Soccer. À Vancouver, l'Australie affronte la Türkiye lors du second match du groupe B. Le match représente leur première rencontre compétitive, mais les deux pays ont déjà disputé deux matchs amicaux en mai 2004, qui ont été remportés par la Türkiye.

programme.title: Coupe du monde de soccer: avant-match
Coupe du Monde de la FIFA 2026
programme.desc: FIFA Soccer. Dans le groupe E, l'Allemagne affronte le Curaçao au Houston Stadium. Manuel Neuer repousse sa retraite afin de participer dans sa cinquième Coupe du Monde. Le Curaçao marque son début contre l'équipe, quatre fois couronnée championne.

programme.title: Coupe du monde de soccer: avant-match
Coupe du Monde de la FIFA 2026
programme.desc: FIFA Soccer. Dans le groupe F, les Pays-Bas affrontent le Japon au Dallas Stadium. Finaliste à trois occasions à la Coupe du Monde, les Pays-Bas étaient invaincus lors des qualifications de la UEFA. Le Japon en est à sa huitième participation.

programme.title: 30 images/seconde
programme.desc: Des palmarès percutants réunissant les moments forts du monde du sport.

programme.title: Coupe du monde de soccer: avant-match
Coupe du Monde de la FIFA 2026
programme.desc: FIFA Soccer. La Côte d'Ivoire et l'Équateur se rencontrent au Philadelphia Stadium lors du second match du groupe E. Ceci marque leur premier match international de nature compétitive. La Côte d'Ivoire fait sa première apparition à la Coupe depuis 2014.

programme.title: Coupe du monde de soccer: avant-match
Coupe du Monde de la FIFA 2026
programme.desc: FIFA Soccer. La Suède et la Tunisie se croisent au Monterrey Stadium lors du second match du groupe F. Viktor Gyökeres, à la tête de la Suède, a marqué 14 buts pour Arsenal. La Tunisie est déterminée après avoir été éliminée en 2022 à la phase de groupe.

programme.desc: Le plus récent match des Alouettes de Montréal, en 30 minutes.
